description: Configure the OpenBCI GUI for a clinical EEG review session using a specific playback file. Load the recording from ~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Recordings/OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt in PLAYBACK mode, start the data stream, and adjust the Time Series display settings: change the Window (horizontal time duration) to 5 seconds and the Vertical Scale to 50 uV.
